codeLensPatterns.title: Show generated CSS
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays the compiled CSS output for the @apply directive utilities.

codeLensPatterns.title: Layer: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows information about the Tailwind layer and its contents.

codeLensPatterns.title: @tailwind ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the styles injected by the @tailwind directive.

codeLensPatterns.title: Resolve theme value
codeLensPatterns.description: Resolves and displays the actual CSS value from the Tailwind theme configuration.

codeLensPatterns.title: ${count} classes
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays the count of Tailwind utility classes applied to this element.

codeLensPatterns.title: Open config: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Opens the referenced Tailwind configuration file.

codeLensPatterns.title: Screen: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the resolved min-width breakpoint value for the @screen directive.

codeLensPatterns.title: Variants: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows information about the generated variants for the contained utilities.

codeLensPatterns.title: Responsive variants
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the responsive breakpoint variants generated for contained utilities.

codeLensPatterns.title: Plugin: custom utilities
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the custom utility classes registered by this plugin API call.

codeLensPatterns.title: Plugin: custom components
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the custom component classes registered by this plugin API call.

codeLensPatterns.title: Keyframes: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the animation keyframe steps and properties.

codeLensPatterns.title: ${count} classes
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays the count of Tailwind utility classes in React className attributes.

codeLensPatterns.title: Source: ${1}
codeLensPatterns.description: Opens the source file referenced by the @source directive.
